discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use publication_aftercare_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read a refs-only publication aftercare control surface for resubmission, talk package, Overleaf sync, ARIS research-pipeline / auto-review-loop / experiment queue absorption, and reviewer refresh. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use external_learning_adoption_closure when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read the MAS-owned closure surface for Co-Scientist, Nature-skills, ARS, AutoSci, EvoScientist/EvoSkills, ARK, ARIS, PaperSpine, and Open Auto Research learning. entries.when_to_use: Use external_learning_adoption_closure when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Read the MAS-owned closure surface for Co-Scientist, Nature-skills, ARS, AutoSci, EvoScientist/EvoSkills, ARK, ARIS, PaperSpine, and Open Auto Research learning. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_capability_discover when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Return the agent-facing Display Pack inventory, callable actions, expected receipt refs, and forbidden authority boundary. This is the low-friction discovery entry for MAS agents; humans manage assets, agents consume this structured capability surface.

entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_capability_discover when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Return the agent-facing Display Pack inventory, callable actions, expected receipt refs, and forbidden authority boundary. This is the low-friction discovery entry for MAS agents; humans manage assets, agents consume this structured capability surface.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_figure_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Given a structured figure_request, rank Display Pack templates as quality-floor baselines and choose the next preflight target. Exact matches use the template contract directly; close matches stay usable through adaptation hints and explicit forbidden-authority boundaries. It prefers R/ggplot2 where the pack declares that renderer, and emits typed blockers instead of asking an agent to manually browse templates.

entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_figure_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Given a structured figure_request, rank Display Pack templates as quality-floor baselines and choose the next preflight target. Exact matches use the template contract directly; close matches stay usable through adaptation hints and explicit forbidden-authority boundaries. It prefers R/ggplot2 where the pack declares that renderer, and emits typed blockers instead of asking an agent to manually browse templates.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_orchestrate when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Compile current_owner_delta, claim/data refs, paper target, natural-language intent, or a partial figure_request into a figure_intent; then rank templates, run preflight, emit quality-floor status, adaptable-template hints, typed repair routes, and the next callable. This is the ordinary low-friction path for autonomous MAS agents and does not require manual template selection.

entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_orchestrate when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Compile current_owner_delta, claim/data refs, paper target, natural-language intent, or a partial figure_request into a figure_intent; then rank templates, run preflight, emit quality-floor status, adaptable-template hints, typed repair routes, and the next callable. This is the ordinary low-friction path for autonomous MAS agents and does not require manual template selection.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_preflight when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Check selected template assets, QC profile, R runtime dependencies, style profile lock, and golden coverage before render. Findings route to style/profile/runtime/template repair without mutating data, statistics, evidence marks, or publication verdicts.

entries.when_to_use: Use display_pack_preflight when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Check selected template assets, QC profile, R runtime dependencies, style profile lock, and golden coverage before render. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_render when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Materialize Display Pack figure artifacts and paper-level display refs from a prepared paper_root or frozen data payload. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use research_integrity_gate_input when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Build a structured Research Integrity gate input bundle from supplied reference, claim, manuscript, and provider-evidence payloads. It only produces evidence, gate input, and blocker candidates; it does not write publication authority, owner receipts, typed blockers, human gates, runtime queues, provider attempts, publication_eval, controller_decisions, or current_package. It remains subordinate to PaperMission -> submission authority -> owner gate / typed blocker.

entries.when_to_use: Use research_integrity_gate_input when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Build a structured Research Integrity gate input bundle from supplied reference, claim, manuscript, and provider-evidence payloads. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use domain_handler_export when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Export MAS-owned read-only projection, pending OPL family tasks, source refs, owner receipt contract and substrate refs for OPL generated/hosted surfaces. It does not authorize study truth, publication quality, artifact gate or current package writes.

entries.when_to_use: Use domain_handler_export when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Export MAS-owned read-only projection, pending OPL family tasks, source refs, owner receipt contract and substrate refs for OPL generated/hosted surfaces. It does not authorize study truth, publication quality, artifact gate or current package writes.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use domain_handler_dispatch when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Boundary for OPL typed task consumption. Ordinary paper execution uses paper_mission/start_or_resume and may materialize non-authority submission milestone candidate packages plus consumption ledgers; legacy owner-callable dispatch is tombstoned and can only return diagnostic/fail-closed readback. This action does not create owner receipts, typed blockers, domain truth, publication quality, artifact gate, current package writes, runtime queue rows, or provider attempts.

entries.when_to_use: Use domain_handler_dispatch when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Boundary for OPL typed task consumption. Ordinary paper execution uses paper_mission/start_or_resume and may materialize non-authority submission milestone candidate packages plus consumption ledgers; legacy owner-callable dispatch is tombstoned and can only return diagnostic/fail-closed readback. This action does not create owner receipts, typed blockers, domain truth, publication quality, artifact gate, current package writes, runtime queue rows, or provider attempts.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use authority_operations when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Call MAS authority-operation domain handlers through one tool: workspace_authority_migration_audit, storage_governance_report, delivery_authority_backfill_apply, artifact_lifecycle_report, artifact_lifecycle_continuous_soak_summary. workspace_authority_migration_audit is dry-run-only; storage_governance_report and artifact_lifecycle_report are read-only; delivery_authority_backfill_apply is MAS delivery-authority gated. Physical cleanup and safe-cache deletion are owned by OPL current-control-state, not MAS. If the needed MAS contract is missing, stop and close the contract gap through a controller-authorized domain handler surface exposed by CLI/MCP/Skill/product-entry before continuing; do not perform ad-hoc execution.

entries.when_to_use: Use authority_operations when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Call MAS authority-operation domain handlers through one tool: workspace_authority_migration_audit, storage_governance_report, delivery_authority_backfill_apply, artifact_lifecycle_report, artifact_lifecycle_continuous_soak_summary. workspace_authority_migration_audit is dry-run-only; storage_governance_report and artifact_lifecycle_report are read-only; delivery_authority_backfill_apply is MAS delivery-authority gated. Physical cleanup and safe-cache deletion are owned by OPL current-control-state, not MAS. If the needed MAS contract is missing, stop and close the contract gap through a controller-authorized domain handler surface exposed by CLI/MCP/Skill/product-entry before continuing; do not perform ad-hoc execution.

capability_invocation_plan_contract.agent_hot_path_rule: Autonomous agents consume AgentExecutionIndex, OperationalToolCard, CapabilityInvocationPlan, and ToolResultEnvelope; raw contracts remain generation and validation inputs.
capability_invocation_plan_contract.non_authority_rule: Invocation metadata never becomes MAS study truth, publication quality, artifact authority, memory authority, or production readiness.
selection_order: diagnostic/support tool only when explicitly requested
typed_blocker candidate when no matching card exists

capability_resolver_contract.non_authority_rule: Capability resolution can rank and explain candidates, but it cannot write domain truth, owner receipts, typed blockers, publication quality, or submission readiness.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use display_pack_figure_plan when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Given a structured figure_request, rank Display Pack templates as quality-floor baselines and choose the next preflight target. Exact matches use the template contract directly; close matches stay usable through adaptation hints and explicit forbidden-authority boundaries. It prefers R/ggplot2 where the pack declares that renderer, and emits typed blockers instead of asking an agent to manually browse templates.

tool_cards.command: medautosci domain-handler dispatch --task <task.json> --format json

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use domain_handler_dispatch when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Boundary for OPL typed task consumption. Ordinary paper execution uses paper_mission/start_or_resume and may materialize non-authority submission milestone candidate packages plus consumption ledgers; legacy owner-callable dispatch is tombstoned and can only return diagnostic/fail-closed readback. This action does not create owner receipts, typed blockers, domain truth, publication quality, artifact gate, current package writes, runtime queue rows, or provider attempts.

tool_cards.command: uv run python -m med_autoscience.cli product governance-report --workspace-root <workspace_root>

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use authority_operations when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Call MAS authority-operation domain handlers through one tool: workspace_authority_migration_audit, storage_governance_report, delivery_authority_backfill_apply, artifact_lifecycle_report, artifact_lifecycle_continuous_soak_summary. workspace_authority_migration_audit is dry-run-only; storage_governance_report and artifact_lifecycle_report are read-only; delivery_authority_backfill_apply is MAS delivery-authority gated. Physical cleanup and safe-cache deletion are owned by OPL current-control-state, not MAS. If the needed MAS contract is missing, stop and close the contract gap through a controller-authorized domain handler surface exposed by CLI/MCP/Skill/product-entry before continuing; do not perform ad-hoc execution.

tool_cards.summary: Call MAS authority-operation domain handlers through one tool: workspace_authority_migration_audit, storage_governance_report, delivery_authority_backfill_apply, artifact_lifecycle_report, artifact_lifecycle_continuous_soak_summary. workspace_authority_migration_audit is dry-run-only; storage_governance_report and artifact_lifecycle_report are read-only; delivery_authority_backfill_apply is MAS delivery-authority gated. discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use domain_handler_dispatch when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Boundary for OPL typed task consumption. Ordinary paper execution uses paper_mission/start_or_resume and may materialize non-authority submission milestone candidate packages plus consumption ledgers; legacy owner-callable dispatch is tombstoned and can only return diagnostic/fail-closed readback. This action does not create owner receipts, typed blockers, domain truth, publication quality, artifact gate, current package writes, runtime queue rows, or provider attempts.

discovery_hint.when_to_use: Use authority_operations when an autonomous agent needs this capability from the current_owner_delta path: Call MAS authority-operation domain handlers through one tool: workspace_authority_migration_audit, storage_governance_report, delivery_authority_backfill_apply, artifact_lifecycle_report, artifact_lifecycle_continuous_soak_summary. workspace_authority_migration_audit is dry-run-only; storage_governance_report and artifact_lifecycle_report are read-only; delivery_authority_backfill_apply is MAS delivery-authority gated. Physical cleanup and safe-cache deletion are owned by OPL current-control-state, not MAS. If the needed MAS contract is missing, stop and close the contract gap through a controller-authorized domain handler surface exposed by CLI/MCP/Skill/product-entry before continuing; do not perform ad-hoc execution.
